prose:
Method provenance
Property: Atom-condensed Fukui functions (f+, f–, f0, dual descriptor) for pyridine; most electrophilic site’s f+ reported under value.
Level of theory: DFT, tier `standard` ≡ B3LYP/def2-TZVP (no density fitting) in PySCF via chemkit.
Geometry provenance: single-point on the user-supplied gas-phase geometry at /home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/fukui-reactivity-validation/pyridine/pyridine.xyz (not re-optimized at DFT; notation DFT//input geometry).
Solvent / environment: gas phase (no implicit solvation).
Charge & multiplicity: 0, 1 (closed-shell singlet).
Software/backend: PySCF (through chemkit fukui-reactivity skill).
Convergence & integrity: SCF and N±1 states converged; integrity.status = ok, trustworthy = true. Checks reported charge conservation for f+ and f– (both sums exactly 1.0000) and schema header present. No additional warnings were reported.
Live log & files: calculation ran with command recorded in the JSON’s cli_invocation field and streamed live to the autogenerated .out log in the working directory; results written to pyridine_fukui_b3lyp.json and bar-chart plot at /home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/fukui-reactivity-validation/pyridine/argo_o3/20260704-170239_pyridine_fukui_reactivity/agent_call_01_plot.png.
